title: taraxacum longiconicum
intro: Taraxacum longiconicum, also known as long-stalked dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion genus. The medicinal properties of this plant include its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum longiconicum include its ability to support kidney function, reduce blood pressure, and act as a natural detoxifier. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to support digestive health and relieve symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions.
